parsed.production_notes: The video uses 3D animated characters with stiff, unnatural movements and uncanny facial expressions typical of AI generation. Lighting and textures have a synthetic, overly smooth quality.

characters.appearance: 30s, slim build, fair complexion, dark hair tied in a bun, red bindi. Wears a beige salwar kameez with brown patterns.
characters.wardrobe: Beige salwar kameez with brown patterns throughout.
characters.demeanor: Shifts from sad and isolated to determined and confident.

characters.appearance: 10 years old, slim build, fair complexion, short dark brown hair.
characters.wardrobe: School uniform (light blue shirt, dark blue shorts) or casual clothes (grey t-shirt).
characters.demeanor: Shifts from embarrassed to apologetic and happy.

characters.appearance: 30s, slim build, fair complexion, dark hair in a bun.
characters.wardrobe: Light green or light pink salwar kameez.

scenes.setting: Living room decorated for a birthday party, daytime, balloons, cake.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands alone with hands clasped in a decorated living room. Other women in traditional clothing chat in the background. Children gather around a table with a birthday cake. Character A appears isolated and sad.

scenes.visual_description: Character A stands alone in a decorated living room while other women chat. Children gather around a birthday cake. Character A appears isolated.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: बच्चे का बर्थडे? सबकी मम्मी इंग्लिश में बात कर रही थीं। [Child's birthday? Everyone's mother was talking in English.]

Unknown speaker says: ये मां कॉर्नर में चुप। बच्चे ने केक काटा। [This mother is quiet in the corner. The child cut the cake.]

Unknown speaker says: मां को फोटो के लिए नहीं बुलाया। अपने ही बच्चे की बर्थडे में मेहमान बन गई। [Didn't call the mother for the photo. Became a guest at her own child's birthday.]

scenes.setting: Kitchen, street with auto-rickshaw, living room.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A cooks at a stove in a kitchen. A man and a young boy stand next to a yellow auto-rickshaw on a street. Three young boys sit at a desk studying under a lamp.

scenes.visual_description: Character A cooks in a kitchen. A man and boy stand by an auto-rickshaw. Three boys study at a desk.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: ये कहानी है सुनीता की। उम्र 34। हिंदी मीडियम। दसवीं तक पढ़ाई। [This is the story of Sunita. Age 34. Hindi medium. Studied till 10th.]

Unknown speaker says: पति ऑटो चलाता है। बेटा अर्जुन, 10 साल। इंग्लिश मीडियम स्कूल। [Husband drives an auto. Son Arjun, 10 years old. English medium school.]

Unknown speaker says: अर्जुन बड़ा हुआ। इंग्लिश में बोलने लगा। दोस्त इंग्लिश में। टीचर इंग्लिश में। मां, हिंदी में। [Arjun grew up. Started speaking in English. Friends in English. Teacher in English. Mother, in Hindi.]

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A and Character B sit on a bench in a classroom facing Character C. Character B looks down sadly. Later, Character B stands in a hallway looking ashamed while another boy talks to him. Character A stands in the background holding a tiffin carrier.

scenes.visual_description: Character A and Character B sit in a classroom with Character C. Character B looks sad. Later, Character B stands ashamed in a hallway. Character A stands in the background with a tiffin.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: पीटीएम में टीचर इंग्लिश में बोलतीं। सुनीता, 'हां मैडम, हां मैडम' करतीं। [In PTM, the teacher would speak in English. Sunita would say, 'Yes Madam, Yes Madam'.]

Unknown speaker says: अर्जुन शर्मिंदा। दोस्त ने पूछा, 'तेरी मम्मी को इंग्लिश नहीं आती?' अर्जुन, चुप। [Arjun embarrassed. A friend asked, 'Doesn't your mother know English?' Arjun, quiet.]

Unknown speaker says: उस दिन से पीटीएम में मां को ले जाना बंद। दोस्त आते, मां को किचन में भेज देता। [From that day, stopped taking mother to PTM. When friends came, he would send mother to the kitchen.]

Unknown speaker says: 'मम्मी, अंदर रहो।' अपने ही घर में पर्दा। ['Mummy, stay inside.' A veil in her own house.]

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits on a bed in a dimly lit room holding a child's drawing. The drawing shows a man, a boy, and a dog. She looks sad. She then holds a smartphone, looking determined.

scenes.visual_description: Character A sits on a bed holding a child's drawing of a family missing the mother. She looks sad, then determined while holding a smartphone.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: एक रात, अर्जुन का स्कूल बैग चेक किया। ड्राइंग मिली। 'माय फैमिली'। [One night, checked Arjun's school bag. Found a drawing. 'My Family'.]

Unknown speaker says: पापा था। अर्जुन था। डॉग था। मां नहीं थी। [Papa was there. Arjun was there. Dog was there. Mother was not there.]

Unknown speaker says: उस रात डिसाइड किया, इंग्लिश सीखूंगी। बेटे के लिए नहीं, अपनी जगह के लिए। [That night decided, I will learn English. Not for the son, for my place.]

Unknown speaker says: इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप। एक रुपये का ट्रायल। [English Seekho App. One rupee trial.]

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands in a kitchen holding a plate, gesturing as if speaking. At night, she sits cross-legged on the floor using her smartphone while Character B sleeps in a bed behind her. Multiple translucent figures of Character A appear, suggesting the passage of time.

scenes.visual_description: Character A practices speaking while cooking. At night, she uses her phone on the floor while Character B sleeps. Translucent figures show time passing.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: एक्सपर्ट के वीडियो देखे। हिंदी में समझा के इंग्लिश बोलना सिखाते हैं। [Watched expert videos. They teach speaking English by explaining in Hindi.]

Unknown speaker says: डेली लाइफ इंग्लिश सीखी। 'हाउ वाज़ स्कूल?', 'वुड यू लाइक स्नैक्स?', 'थैंक यू फॉर कमिंग'। [Learned daily life English. 'How was school?', 'Would you like snacks?', 'Thank you for coming'.]

Unknown speaker says: एआई कोच से रात को चैट करके प्रैक्टिस करती थी। अर्जुन, सोने के बाद। [Used to practice by chatting with AI coach at night. After Arjun slept.]

Unknown speaker says: 'हेलो, आई एम अर्जुनस मदर। ही इज अ गुड स्टूडेंट।' गलत लिखती थी, सुधार देता था। [ 'Hello, I am Arjun's mother. He is a good student.' If she wrote wrong, it would correct it.]

Unknown speaker says: सौ बार सुधार दिया। अर्जुन जैसा नहीं था वो, जो शर्मिंदा होता था। तीन महीने, रोज़ 15 मिनट। [Corrected a hundred times. It wasn't like Arjun, who would be embarrassed. Three months, 15 minutes daily.]

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A and Character B sit in a classroom facing Character C. Character A gestures confidently while speaking. Character B looks up at her in surprise. Later, in a dimly lit living room, Character B stands with his head bowed before Character A. They then embrace.

scenes.visual_description: Character A speaks confidently to Character C in the classroom. Character B looks surprised. At home, Character B bows his head before Character A, then they hug.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: अगला पीटीएम। सुनीता गई। [Next PTM. Sunita went.]

Unknown speaker says: टीचर ने बोला, 'हाउ इज अर्जुन एट होम? ही इज वेरी डेडिकेटेड। ही स्टडीज टू आवर्स डेली। बट गेट्स डिस्ट्रैक्टेड बाय फोन समटाइम्स।' [Teacher said, 'How is Arjun at home? He is very dedicated. He studies two hours daily. But gets distracted by phone sometimes.']

Unknown speaker says: टीचर बोली, 'मिसेज सुनीता, योर इंग्लिश इज वेरी गुड।' अर्जुन का मुंह खुला। [Teacher said, 'Mrs. Sunita, your English is very good.' Arjun's mouth fell open.]

Unknown speaker says: रात को अर्जुन आया। बोला, 'मम्मी, आई एम सॉरी। मैंने आपको पीटीएम में आने से मना किया था। दोस्तों के सामने भेजा था। आई एम सॉरी।' [At night Arjun came. Said, 'Mummy, I am sorry. I forbade you from coming to PTM. Sent you away in front of friends. I am sorry.']

Unknown speaker says: सुनीता ने कुछ नहीं बोला। बस गले लगाया। [Sunita didn't say anything. Just hugged him.]

panels.panel_visual_description: Character B sits at a desk drawing a picture. The drawing shows a family with the mother prominently in the center. Character A and a man stand proudly behind him. Montage of Character A using her phone on the bed and cooking in the kitchen.

scenes.visual_description: Character B draws a family picture with the mother in the center. Character A and a man stand behind him. Montage of Character A using her phone and cooking.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: अगले दिन नई ड्राइंग। 'माय फैमिली'। पापा, अर्जुन, डॉग, और बीच में सबसे बड़ी, मां। [Next day new drawing. 'My Family'. Papa, Arjun, Dog, and in the middle the biggest, Mother.]

Unknown speaker says: इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। एक्सपर्ट से सीखो। एआई कोच से चैट करके प्रैक्टिस करो। [Download English Seekho App. Learn from experts. Practice by chatting with AI coach.]

Unknown speaker says: एक रुपये का ट्रायल। रोज़ 15 मिनट। [One rupee trial. 15 minutes daily.]

Unknown speaker says: इंग्लिश से नौकरी नहीं मिली, सैलरी नहीं बढ़ी। [Didn't get a job from English, salary didn't increase.]

Unknown speaker says: एक मां को अपने घर में अपनी जगह वापस मिली। अपने बेटे की ड्राइंग में अपनी जगह वापस मिली। यही काफी है। [A mother got her place back in her house. Got her place back in her son's drawing. This is enough.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A smartphone is displayed against a dark background. The screen shows a stylized logo.

scenes.visual_description: A smartphone displays a logo on a dark background.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: तो इंस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो और इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button and download the English Seekho app.]
scenes.on_screen_text: english INSTALL NOW Disclaimer English Seekho kisi bhi government authority, institution, brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names, trademarks, logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai. Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai. English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta. Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
